2026-04-10T16:07:21.6837936Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6839107Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6840040Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6840725Z 
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6841064Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6841947Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6842449Z 
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6842636Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6842981Z 
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6843181Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6843489Z 
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6843647Z   git switch -
2026-04-10T16:07:21.6843876Z
